rows.label: qev031201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Wazdo Tygant! Round up any
of the clan with free time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0002
rows.name:
And the moment you find the
fool who kidnapped my daughter,
bathe him in his own blood![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ooh! For Lavina's sake, I'd even
go to war with the Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well said! That's exactly what
a Bias warrior should be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hm? You're an Earthling! What
the hell did you come here for?
Could you be a spy sent by Leroy!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_JNK0010
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031201_SEL0011
rows.name: Deny the false accusation.

rows.label: qev031201_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask who Leroy is.

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0006
rows.name:
That look on your face... You
certainly seem to be a different
kind of Earthling from that coward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm sorry. My daughter was
kidnapped by an Earthling named
Leroy, and I lost my temper...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0008
rows.name:
He's the Earthling who kidnapped my
daughter! Guh... To think such a weakling
would pull off something so audacious...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hey... If you don't mind, would
you help me get my daughter back?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0010
rows.name:
It seems he fled into the Commercial District.
There's nothing more reassuring than an
Earthling like you searching for him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ooh! So there are good guys like
you among the Earthlings too, huh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0012
rows.name:
My daughter was scheduled to marry this
Wazdo Tygant very soon. Please bring her
back quickly so she can be happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then. I bet
a coward like him is sneaking
around hiding somewhere deserted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG1001
rows.name:
I met Leroy once before, and he
was an exceptionally puny and
cowardly man, even for an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG1002
rows.name:
I bet a guy like that is sneaking around hiding
somewhere particularly deserted within the
Commercial District. Make sure you find him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG2001
rows.name:
You played me for a fool, but... My
daughter has returned to me like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG2002
rows.name:
Hmph, take this. It's
the promised reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG2004
rows.name:
To be honest, when I traded blows
with you... I felt the bottomless
potential of you Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG2005
rows.name:
To think you can become so strong even
without being a Bias. Leroy will have to
acquire that level of strength as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG2006
rows.name:
Yeah... Otherwise, his words
about protecting my daughter
will turn out to be a lie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG2007
rows.name:
Heh, from now on, I'm going to
strictly train him the Bias way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3001
rows.name:
Leroy's battle with you... I watched
the whole thing from start to finish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3002
rows.name:
You are strong, of course, but
it seems that weakling put up
a decent fight, didn't he?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031201_SEL0031
rows.name: Acknowledge Leroy's strength.

rows.label: qev031201_JNK0040
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Laugh it off and say
it was nothing much.

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3003
rows.name:
If you, the one who clashed with him
directly, say so, then it must be true![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3004
rows.name:
Well, compared to you, that's probably
true. Even among the Bias, there
aren't many warriors like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3005
rows.name:
Heh... You Earthlings are an interesting
bunch. Even with small bodies, you
hold something bottomless inside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3006
rows.name:
I'm looking forward to seeing him show
up before me after growing a bit more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031201_MSG3007
rows.name:
...I owe you for a lot of things!
Here, take this with you![ST:wait ]
